# llms.txt for mascotmaker.io
> Mascot Maker is a free AI-powered mascot, logo, and sticker design studio. It creates studio-quality 3D, 2D, and vector brand assets with full identity consistency across every pose and scene.

## Core Differentiator
Unlike generic AI image generators, Mascot Maker uses "Identity Lock" technology to preserve character DNA — the same facial features, proportions, and brand colors — across unlimited generations. This solves the "AI Drift" problem that makes Midjourney and Stable Diffusion impractical for brand mascots.

## Free Tools
- [Free Mascot Generator](https://mascotmaker.io/create): Create consistent AI mascots, sticker packs, and brand characters.
- [Free Logo Generator](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/logo-generator): Design minimalist, 3D, and vector logos in seconds.
- [Free Background Remover](https://mascotmaker.io/background-remover): Instantly remove image backgrounds with studio-grade AI precision.
- [Style Explorer](https://mascotmaker.io/explore): Browse all 8 supported professional art styles.

## Art Styles Supported
3D Pixar, Claymation, Minimalist, Vector Art, Retro 80s, Isometric, Flat Illustration, Pixel Art.

## Best For
- SaaS Founders building a professional brand identity.
- Discord & Telegram Communities wanting custom sticker packs.
- App Developers needing consistent icons and logos.
- Marketing Teams producing high-end, branded character content.

## Compare
- [Mascot Maker vs Midjourney](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/midjourney): Consistency and logos vs. general artistic freedom.
- [Mascot Maker vs Canva](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/canva): Custom AI-generated assets vs. generic templates.
- [Mascot Maker vs DALL-E 3](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/dalle): Brand-safe character identity vs. general image generation.

## About
Built to make high-end character and brand design accessible to everyone. No design experience required. Commercial rights included for all generations.
